chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.389 of 2024 (The State v. MCB Islamic Bank Limited) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF THE JUDGE 1. For order on M.A. No.4875/2024 2. For orders on office objection & reply of Adv at Flag A 3. For order on M.A. No.4876/2024 4. For hearing of main case 26.04.2024 Mr. Muhammad Anwar Mahar, DDPP ------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. By way of the instant Crl. Misc. Application u/s 94 r/w Section 561-A Cr.PC a direction has been sought by the State against Operation Manager, Paper Market Branch Shahrah-e-Liaquat, Karachi, to produce certain documents necessary for the investigation of case outcome of FIR Crime No.70/2024 under Section 489-F PPC, PS Aram Bagh District South. Head arguments and perused the record. If for the sake of arguments, it is believed that the Operation Manager, Paper Market Branch Shahrah-e-Liaquat, Karachi, has failed to produce the documents required for the investigation of the subject case, then he could have proceeded with in terms of Section 175 P.PC. If the Investigating Officer has no intention to take action against him for such omission under the said penal section, then alternatively subject to the law he could approach the Magistrate/Sessions Judge having jurisdiction for the purpose. No case for indulgence by this Court is made out. Consequently, the instant Crl. Misc. Application is dismissed in limine. J U D G E Nadir*
